fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the No. of the table physical inventory order header.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Description of the table physical inventory order header.

fields.name: Order Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Order Date of the table physical inventory order header.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Posting Date of the table physical inventory order header.

fields.name: Person Responsible
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Person Responsible of the table physical inventory order header.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Pre-Assigned No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the physical inventory header, from which the posted physical inventory order was posted.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Location Code of the table physical inventory order header.
